headline: US Stock Futures Gain as Crude Oil Drops on Iran: Markets Wrap
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Global stocks rose to record highs as crude oil fell after officials signaled the US was nearing a deal with Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore oil flows. headline: Delivery Hero shares surge to 18-month high on report Uber will make a new offer
summary: Investing.com -- Delivery Hero shares reached the highest level in 18 months on Monday after the German food delivery company disclosed it received an indicative offer from Uber, with a Financial Times report suggesting the U.S. company may increase its bid.
